overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character in a long coat walking through a snowy mountain canyon at night. The character travels along railway tracks before veering onto a snow-covered path lined with stone lanterns, eventually reaching an open area with dramatic cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered railway cutting through rocky canyon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the center of snow-covered railway tracks through a narrow canyon

entered.detail: snow-covered railway tracks extending into the distance between rocky walls
tall dark rock wall forming the left side of the canyon
tall dark rock wall forming the right side of the canyon
thick snow covering the railway bed and surrounding terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along snow-covered railway tracks cutting through a narrow rocky canyon. The high cliff walls block most of the sky, creating an enclosed feeling in the dim blue twilight.

events.description: character steps off the railway tracks to the left onto snow-covered ground

agents.ego_description: veering left off the railway tracks to walk on uneven snow-covered terrain beside large rock formations

entered.detail: large snow-dusted boulders beside the path
narrow walking path through deep snow

segments.scene_description: Leaving the railway tracks behind, the character walks on snow-covered ground through a rocky area. Large boulders and snow drifts line the path as distant lights become visible ahead in the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: lantern-lit canyon pathway with stone walls

events.description: warm light from stone lanterns becomes visible ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along a snow path lined with stone walls and approaching lantern lights

entered.detail: lit stone lantern on a post illuminating the path
low stone wall lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path enters a more structured canyon area with stone retaining walls and periodic lantern posts providing warm light against the blue snow. The canyon remains enclosed by high rock walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon pass under dramatic night sky

events.description: canyon opens up revealing expansive cloudy night sky and silhouetted pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through the canyon as the walls lower and the dramatic night sky becomes visible

entered.detail: dramatic cloudy sky with blue moonlight breaking through
tall pine trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens dramatically to reveal a vast cloudy night sky with moonlight breaking through. Pine trees silhouette against the blue clouds as the character continues along the lantern-lit snow path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic rocky canyon that gradually opens into a vast, moonlit mountain landscape. It begins with the character walking along snow-covered railway tracks enclosed by towering cliff walls under a dim blue twilight. As the character leaves the tracks behind, the terrain shifts into a rugged area of boulders and snow drifts where distant lights first appear ahead. The scene then transitions into a more structured corridor featuring stone retaining walls and warm lantern posts that contrast with the deep blue snow. Finally, the narrow canyon walls fall away to reveal a dramatic night sky with moonlight breaking through heavy clouds and silhouetted pine trees lining the path.
